--- "Spector, Edward (Private Banking and Investment -
WFCB)" edward_spector@ml.com wrote:

Jeffrey,

Tried to reach you. Peso strengthened slightly
today. Still at 5mm USD
for FTC.. It is now around 10.84. If it gets to
about 10.80, I think we
should take your profits and wait for 10.90 or so
again and put the 20mm
in. If it hits the 10.90 range first, then we would
look to fill the
remaining 15mm. The profits as of now are about
$25m.

Ed
